sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_shingles AS SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive('Sample text for testing.', 2, 4) AS shingle_hashes;
INSERT INTO test_shingles SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive('Another example to insert.', 3, 5);
UPDATE test_shingles SET shingle_hashes = wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive('Updated text with new content.', 2, 3) WHERE shingle_hashes.1 = 'sample';
SELECT shingle_hashes FROM test_shingles WHERE shingle_hashes.2 = 'another';
